title: Badge: Needs First Kid
resultGreatDescription: You made {{score}} smart need prioritization decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
skillsDescription: You learned to prioritize needs like school supplies, shoes, and essentials over wants like games and toys!
wisdomDescription: These habits will help you make better financial decisions and reach your goals!
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart need prioritization decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepTip: Remember, needs come before wants when making financial decisions. This helps you build good financial habits!

challenges.title: Smart Shopping
challenges.question: You have ₹20. Buy candy or a school notebook?

feedback.correct: Great choice! School supplies are needs that help you learn!
feedback.wrong: Remember: Needs like school supplies come before wants like candy!

challenges.title: Money Management
challenges.question: You need ₹15 for lunch. You have ₹10. What's smart?

feedback.correct: Wise decision! Saving more money shows good financial planning!
feedback.wrong: It's better to save more money than to borrow or skip meals!

challenges.title: Priority Choice
challenges.question: You want a game but need shoes. What comes first?

feedback.correct: Perfect! Needs like shoes come before wants like games!
feedback.wrong: Remember: Always buy what you need first before buying what you want!

challenges.title: Money Choice
challenges.question: You have ₹30. Spend on needs or wants?

feedback.correct: Excellent! Prioritizing needs over wants is smart financial behavior!
feedback.wrong: Needs should come before wants when spending your money!

feedback.correct: Right! Needs meet your essential requirements for life!
feedback.wrong: Needs are essential for survival and well-being, while wants are just nice to have!
